title: Cozy Creepers
description: An opinionated Minecraft modpack that focuses on making the game more Cozy with new biomes, structures, and a variety of decoration mods.
body:
### A small, opinionated Minecraft modpack that aims to Cozy up your Minecraft experience.
An opinionated Minecraft modpack that focuses on making the game more Cozy with new biomes, structures, and a variety of decoration mods.

Whether you're a builder, an adventurer, or just looking for a more immersive experience, this modpack expands the game with a variety of decoration, quality-of-life, and a nice mix of popular mods to dive into. Curl up by the fireplace, decorate your home with stylish furniture, and wander through stunning landscapes—all while enjoying a Cozy Minecraft.

### What does 'opinionated' mean?
It means this modpack is meant for a certain kind of person, and we have our own way of playing the game, and thus, won't be focusing on stuff like advanced combat or technology. There's plenty of great modpacks for that! This modpack is for those who like building, or throwing a bit of roleplaying in there.

### Why does this exist?
I wanted my favorite mods in one place. I found other modpacks to either have too little (Vanilla+ packs) or too much (Hardcore Tech packs). I've enjoyed all kinds of modpacks personally, but I've always wanted a collection of mods somewhere in between the two, and hopefully others would like my mix of mods too!

### Recommended for multiplayer
This modpack was designed for small servers of 5-15 players and the recommended way to play:
* With a World Border of 5000-10000
* Enabling Simple Voice Proximity features
* No Map Clientside mods
